title: Craftable Grass Block│可合成草方塊
description: Added Grass Block recipe.│添加了草方塊配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
You can create a grass block by placing grass on top of dirt, just like planting grass on dirt.│將泥土上方放上草即可製作草方塊，就像將草種到泥土上一樣。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
